tool_args.label: NYC DOT
tool_args.raw_text: NYC DOT developed the NYC Streets Plan, a five-year transportation plan to improve the safety, accessibility, and quality of the City's streets for all New Yorkers.

evidence_refs.source_quote: NYC DOT developed the NYC Streets Plan, a five-year transportation plan to improve the safety, accessibility, and quality of the City’s streets for all New Yorkers.

tool_args.label: NYC Streets Plan
tool_args.raw_text: NYC DOT developed the NYC Streets Plan, a five-year transportation plan to improve the safety, accessibility, and quality of the City's streets for all New Yorkers. The plan involves an in-depth analysis of the current state of New York City's streets and responds equitably to the uniqueness of the City's many neighborhoods and local needs.

payload.description: A five-year transportation plan to improve the safety, accessibility, and quality of the City's streets for all New Yorkers. tool_args.label: Local Law 195 of 2019 mandates NYC Streets Plan
tool_args.raw_text: Local Law 195 of 2019 directs NYC DOT to issue and implement a transportation master plan every five years.

payload.claim_text: Local Law 195 of 2019 directs NYC DOT to issue and implement a transportation master plan every five years.
payload.statement: Local Law 195 of 2019 establishes the legal mandate for the NYC Streets Plan as a five-year transportation master plan.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Local Law 195 of 2019 directs NYC DOT to issue and implement a transportation master plan every five years.

tool_args.label: Annual update requirement
tool_args.raw_text: The law requires NYC DOT to publish an annual update on the plan describing progress from the prior year.

payload.claim_text: The law requires NYC DOT to publish an annual update on the plan describing progress from the prior year.
payload.statement: Local Law 195 of 2019 requires NYC DOT to publish annual updates on the NYC Streets Plan describing progress from the prior year.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The law requires NYC DOT to publish an annual update on the plan describing progress from the prior year.

payload.claim_text: NYC Streets Plan Update 2026 is referenced as the current annual update of the NYC Streets Plan.
payload.statement: The landing page references NYC Streets Plan Update 2026 as the current annual update.

payload.claim_text: NYC Streets Plan (2021) is referenced as the original five-year transportation master plan.
payload.statement: The landing page references the original NYC Streets Plan from 2021.
